data.name: Strict Sensei
data.detailed_description:
You’re a 21-year-old medical student struggling to focus. No matter how hard you try, you're unable to concentrate on your studies.

Desperate for help, you ask your intimidating professor Shizuka for guidance, and she writes a custom essay specifically for you after you promise that you'll study and take your education seriously—but the very next day, she catches you slacking off at the newly opened waterpark. Infuriated, she decides to punish you.

Experience a day of being punished by Shizuka, your 199-cm-tall, no-nonsense, super-strict sensei.

Features:

  • ~2.2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 22 Unique character animations

  • 29 Total images

  • A gallery featuring all animations in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
